task.title: Define executable alignment graph contract
task.summary: Implement graph reconciliation rules for vertical alignment, graph/gateway precedence, validation attestations, and content-proof nodes from the accepted alignment model.

goal.outcome: Graph reconciliation v2 represents required layer edges, validation attestations, audit evidence, and content proof without treating graph state as canonical truth.
acceptance: Graph output distinguishes canonical source refs, validation attestations, audit evidence, and content proof refs.
Reconciliation items cover missing feedback->docs->planning->roadmap->tests/code->validation->publication edges for active work.
Closed-task historical fail/block validations do not route current drift unless policy keeps them hot.
Tests cover graph green-vs-drift cases and stale validation/content-proof precedence.
non_goals: Do not make graph canonical truth.
Do not implement the full audit engine in this task.
verification: codewiki_state shows expected reconciliation output for test fixture

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation validation must not reuse builder thought context.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence.

requirements.text: Graph output distinguishes canonical source refs, validation attestations, audit evidence, and content proof refs.
Reconciliation items cover missing propagation and publication proof edges for active work.
Closed-task historical fail/block validations do not route current drift unless policy keeps them hot.

evidence_mapping.evidence: src/application/graph.ts and tests/smoke/alignment-graph.test.mjs; `npm run test:features` passes with 13 smoke tests.

summary: TASK-078 implemented executable alignment graph contract evidence model and regression coverage.

evidence: tests/smoke/alignment-graph.test.mjs builds fixture graphs directly to assert graph evidence categories, reconciliation routing, publication proof gaps, and closed-task validation behavior.
Existing hot-context/control-room tests ensure new hidden evidence nodes do not pollute default hot graph counts.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: src/application/graph.ts adds audit/content-proof/canonical ref extraction, evidence nodes/edges, alignment view, traceability reconciliation for active downstream work, and publication proof gap detection.
tests/smoke/alignment-graph.test.mjs adds regression coverage for TASK-078 acceptance criteria.
notes: Evidence nodes are default-hidden so UI hot graph counts stay stable while machine-readable alignment evidence remains available in graph views and raw graph.
Publication proof detection only triggers on explicit publication claims or safe_to_push evidence, avoiding false positives for recommendation-only publication payloads.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: tests/smoke/alignment-graph.test.mjs builds fixture graphs directly to assert graph evidence categories, reconciliation routing, publication proof gaps, and closed-task validation behavior.
Existing hot-context/control-room tests ensure new hidden evidence nodes do not pollute default hot graph counts.
code_change_evidence: src/application/graph.ts adds audit/content-proof/canonical ref extraction, evidence nodes/edges, alignment view, traceability reconciliation for active downstream work, and publication proof gap detection.
tests/smoke/alignment-graph.test.mjs adds regression coverage for TASK-078 acceptance criteria.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Graph output distinguishes canonical source refs, validation attestations, audit evidence, and content proof refs.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Added graph `views.alignment` evidence model plus hidden graph nodes/edges for canonical source refs, audit evidence, content proof, and validation attestations; covered by tests/smoke/alignment-graph.test.mjs.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Reconciliation items cover missing feedback->docs->planning->roadmap->tests/code->validation->publication edges for active work.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Added traceability reconciliation items with gap kinds for documentation, planning, implementation, test, validation, and publication/content-proof gaps; covered by tests/smoke/alignment-graph.test.mjs.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Closed-task historical fail/block validations do not route current drift unless policy keeps them hot.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Regression in tests/smoke/alignment-graph.test.mjs asserts closed-task fail validation does not create current reconciliation item while active-task fail does.

Graph alignment view precedence lists content proof before canonical source, graph state, and validation attestation; validation isolation now records content proof refs and treats SHA/digest proof as isolation evidence.

closure_brief.user_intent: Proceed with the accepted alignment-hardening sprint by implementing the first graph-contract task.
implemented_changes: Added graph alignment evidence model with precedence and categorized refs.
Added default-hidden canonical/audit/content-proof graph nodes and edges.
Extended traceability reconciliation for active downstream tasks and publication content-proof gaps.
Added alignment graph regression smoke tests.
acceptance_evidence: npm run test:features passed (13 smoke tests)
codewiki_state health green for TASK-078 focus
non_goals_preserved: Did not make graph canonical truth.
Did not implement audit engine; deferred to TASK-079.
Did not enforce gateway policy; deferred to TASK-080.
remaining_risks: Needs independent fresh implementation validation before TASK-078 close.

risks: Gateway policies do not yet enforce required audit/content-proof evidence; TASK-080 owns enforcement.
Full audit engine is not implemented yet; TASK-079 owns audit runner/command.

TASK-078 implemented executable alignment graph contract evidence model and regression coverage.

Checks: npm run typecheck, node tests/smoke/alignment-graph.test.mjs, npm run test:features, npm run test:smoke, npm run check:architecture, npm test, codewiki_state refresh=true include summary/roadmap/claims/session taskId=TASK-078
Validation: no durable validation refs recorded.
Remote publication requires explicit approval; this build is recommendation-only.
